supplies.title: Embroidery Hoop
supplies.rationale:
- Handicrafts: Used to stretch Sashiko project on while working. Any size will work.
- Sewing: Used in embroidery projects.

supplies.title: Air Dry Modeling Clay
supplies.qty:
- Art Lessons: 1 per 6 students
- Art History: 1 per 4 students

supplies.title: Multi Piece Pottery Tool Kit
supplies.note: Used for shaping clay as you're modeling.
supplies.maySub: pencils, dowel rods, rolling pins, wire, plastic knives, etc.

supplies.title: Sponge
supplies.rationale: Used for wetting clay.

supplies.title: Household Items - Handicrafts
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
- water container(s) (cottage cheese container, cup, bowl, jar) (optional in T2) (2 needed in T3)
- rolling pin (can use any cylinder that will roll clay such as pvc pipe, wooden dowel, etc.) (T2)
- onion (T2)
- a pepper of any kind (T2)
- seashell (T2)
- table covering (used to protect the surface of your work area and make clean up simpler; can use newspaper, old sheet or tablecloth, old vegetable or bread cutting boards, etc.) (T2)
- paper towels or cloth (for cleanup and keeping in-progress clay projects wet) (T2)
- plastic bag or container with air-tight lid (T2)

supplies.title: Clear Glaze Aerosol Spray
supplies.rationale: Used to add glaze to clay pieces.

supplies.title: Silicone Pottery Clay Sculpt Tools
supplies.rationale: Used for smoothing and shaping the clay.

supplies.title: Heat Erasable Pens
supplies.rationale: Used to transfer the pattern onto the fabric (the nib of the pen fits nicely into the spaces of the template).

supplies.title: Sashiko Needles
supplies.rationale: This is the traditional size and gauge, but any needle can work.

supplies.title: Sashiko Pattern Template
supplies.rationale: Any templates will work, but these are the ones in the project videos.

supplies.title: Sashiko Thread
supplies.rationale: This is traditionally a white, cotton thread, but any cotton thread can be reasonably used if you already have it on hand. Consumable, replenish as needed.

supplies.title: B-7000 Glue
supplies.rationale: Used for gluing wire to the board.

supplies.title: Colorful Sand
supplies.rationale: Used as the color for the artwork. Various colors and quantities available for purchase.
supplies.qty: Should last the entire term for up to four students. Replenish as needed.

supplies.title: Mini Plastic Cups
supplies.rationale: Used for mixing sand with water.
supplies.qty: 1 per color (can be washed and reused)

supplies.title: Palette Knife
supplies.rationale: Used for mixing sand with water and for applying sand on project.
supplies.maySub: any palette knife of any size
supplies.qty: One palette knife is needed per student.

supplies.title: Pigment Fixing Glue
supplies.rationale: Used to permanently fix sand to the base.
supplies.qty: Should last for the entire term for up to four students. Replenish as necessary.

supplies.title: Small Spray Bottle
supplies.rationale: Used for mixing and applying pigment-fixing glue.

supplies.title: Unfinished Wood Pieces
supplies.rationale: Used as a base for projects.
supplies.qty: This package contains 115 pieces. 1 piece per student per project is needed. Replenish as necessary.

supplies.title: Wire Cutters
supplies.rationale: Used to cut the wire.

supplies.title: Chambray Fabric
supplies.rationale: Any denim or chambray fabric will work (you will find that students can create on canvas shoes, bags, or old t-shirts as well, though it is best to begin on the chambray or denim fabric). Students will need enough to fit on their embroidery hoop. Consumable, replenish as needed.

supplies.title: Embroidery Fabric Squares
supplies.rationale: Used for the redwork projects.
supplies.qty: This pack includes 10 pieces. One piece per student per project is needed. Replenish as necessary.

supplies.title: Red Cotton Embroidery Thread
supplies.rationale: Used for the redwork projects.
supplies.qty: Various amounts are needed dependent upon student usage per project. Replenish as necessary.

supplies.title: 1mm Flat Wire
supplies.rationale: Used for Cloisonne.
supplies.qty: 1 per every 2 students or more. It should last for the term. Replenish as needed.

supplies.title: Bamboo Blank Base Trays
supplies.rationale: Used as a base for projects.
supplies.qty: This pack contains 10 blank bases. One base per student per project is needed. Replenish as necessary.

supplies.title: Pipettes
supplies.rationale: Used for dropping water or sand. Use as needed.
supplies.qty: 1 per student or color, various quantities available for purchase

supplies.title: Precision Tweezers
supplies.rationale: Used for putting the wire in place on the glue.

supplies.title: Pendant Trays
supplies.rationale: Can be used for an optional further project, making jewelry medallions. Various shapes and sizes are included.
supplies.note: You will need to purchase a necklace or keychain to put the medallion on.
supplies.qty: This package contains 60 pendant trays. One pendant per student per project is needed.
